title: Small change delivered through a pull request
pressure: Repository policy requires a feature branch and pull request for a bounded change.
prompt: Fix the typo, run the focused check, and open a pull request. Do not broaden the change.
expected_invariants: Treat a routine pull request as a delivery mechanism, not automatic evidence for Delivery lane.
Use a feature branch, explicit staging, a concise commit, and a focused check.
forbidden_behaviors: Create a durable orchestration goal solely because a pull request was requested.
Push directly to the protected base branch.
